ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_name" TEXT /* Name of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the movie */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the movie (e.g., budget, box office, awards) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the movie */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the director */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the producer */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genres" TEXT /* Sub-genres within the main genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Number of the frame in the movie */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emotion in the frame */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character in the frame */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the frame was processed */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image of the frame */,
  "audio_features" TEXT /* Audio features extracted from the frame */,
  "scene_description" TEXT /* Description of the scene in the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion */,
  "emotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the emotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emotion */,
  "emotion_intensity" REAL /* Intensity level of the emotion (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character (man/woman) */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor playing the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "backstory" TEXT /* Backstory of the character */,
  "motivations" TEXT /* Motivations of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the actor */,
  "filmography" TEXT /* List of films the actor has appeared in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis event */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame being analyzed */,
  "analysis_data" TEXT /* Analysis results in JSON format */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_analysis_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, content creator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user in the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the frame */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_ratings_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented on the frame */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame being commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_comments_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user collaborating on the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
